MINI MINUTES:
This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Ron Sinclair. Jack Marquez, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Shi Ren Huang and Thomas E. Drohan, Esq. represented Defendant, Andrew L. Mizarro. The Case settled per written stipulation of parties which is read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
